## Type of change
- [ ] 🐛 Bugfix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature)

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (ESLint/Stylelint)
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] Lighthouse CI shows no regressions (scores above 90)
- [ ] I have verified responsiveness and native Dark Mode
- [ ] The behavior works correctly on iOS and WebKit-based browsers
